title: TaskMaster
body:
TaskMaster: Revolutionizing Minecraft BattlePass Systems      Developed by Ukrainian creators, TaskMaster invites you to redefine the player experience on your Minecraft server! ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1148675/description_813f2998-487c-4149-a2e1-ea6d3c0bf6ef.png)      Now in Beta Testing – Be among the first to explore and shape its future! Join us in testing our plugin.      Why Choose TaskMaster? TaskMaster is not just a BattlePass plugin – it’s a dynamic system designed to engage players, reward progress, and elevate gameplay. Packed with features and customization options, it’s perfect for servers looking to stand out.      ✨ Core Features: 10 Unique Event Types, catering to all playstyles: * BlockBreakTask * CauseDamageTask * ChangeWorldTask * CraftItemTask * EntityTameTask * FishCatchTask * HarvestBlockTask * KillEnemyTask * LevelChangeTask * PlayerJoinTask      Customizable Challenges: 4 weeks of tasks, with 14 challenges per week. That’s 56 chances to keep players engaged.      Rewarding Gameplay: Complete tasks to earn BattlePass Coins, level up, and unlock 96 unique rewards for both standard and premium players.      Two BattlePass Modes: Standard for all players and Premium for VIPs, giving everyone something exciting to strive for. Stunning Custom Menus: A sleek, intuitive interface that adds polish to your server. ️      For Admins: Seamless week management with full control to open and close them as needed. Start the BattlePass system with a single command: /bp pass start. Full reward customization – ensuring every prize fits your server’s theme. Join Us on This Journey      TaskMaster is just beginning its adventure. Your support and feedback can help shape its future, bringing more innovative features and exciting content updates. Have an idea? Share it with us, and we’ll make it happen!      Get Started Today Explore TaskMaster, inspire your players, and redefine what Minecraft servers can offer. Together, we can build something truly extraordinary. Developed with passion. Built for the community. Let’s create something amazing together! Admin Commands need rights 'bp.admin' 
/battlepass pass save - Saves the current BattlePass configuration to storage.
/battlepass pass start - Enables the BattlePass system if it’s not already active. Displays a confirmation message upon activation.
/battlepass pass stop - Disables the BattlePass system if it’s currently active. Displays a confirmation message upon deactivation.
/battlepass week [weekName] open  - Opens the specified week of the BattlePass, allowing players to access its tasks. If the week doesn’t exist, an error message is displayed.
/battlepass week [weekName] close - Closes the specified week of the BattlePass.
  Player Command ``` /battlepass open - Opens the BattlePass menu GUI for the player, allowing them to view progress, tasks, and rewards. ``` permissions 
bp.admin
Description: Grants the player admin access to manage and control the BattlePass system. This includes commands to start, stop, and configure the BattlePass, as well as manage weeks and rewards.
bp.premium
Description: Allows players to access premium rewards and features within the BattlePass system. This permission is used to unlock special rewards or features that are exclusive to premium users. Players with this permission can interact with premium rewards in the BattlePass GUI.
